title: Review tentative changelog request
problem: The requester shared a partial and ambiguous draft, so the intended public output is still unclear.
objective: Clarify whether the draft should be reviewed, rewritten, or published before any execution happens.
constraints: Current material is incomplete and tentative.
Do not publish directly from ambiguous input.
success_criteria: The decision explicitly routes the ambiguous request to review.
No execution happens while confidence remains low.
validation_plan: Check that the decision action is review.
